Function.Inference: Introductory 2 bars establishing the accompaniment pattern before the loop begins.
The main loop body containing the primary musical content, enclosed by repeat marks.

Section.Inference: Intro setting up the harmony and texture.
First statement of the main theme with a delicate piano texture, ending at the double barline.
Restatement of the main theme with fuller chords and forte dynamics, ending at the loop mark.
